education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science & Engineering
education.institution: Indira Gandhi Institute of Technology (IGIT), Sarang

bullets: Engineered a scalable multi-layer analytics engine for a Canada-based fintech client, improving API response times by 35% using optimized REST endpoints.
Developed a modular Single Page Application using React and Node.js, ensuring strict data contracts and clean separation of concerns for a 40% reduction in maintenance overhead.
Designed an asynchronous analytical dashboard capable of rendering complex datasets (confidence envelopes, deep data maps) without UI thread blocking, handling up to 10k data points in real time.
Managed international async project milestones, contract SLAs, and independent code deployment workflows on render/Docker environments.

projects.name: crypto-bot / insta-bot
